task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Gettysburg National Military Park location on the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on Gettysburg, PA, or search bar showing coordinates 39.8133, -77.2308

task_completion.description: Agent opens the dialog to create or edit a new placemark
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark', 'Properties', or 'Edit Placemark' dialog box is visible on screen

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct name and coordinates for the placemark
task_completion.visual_evidence: Placemark name field contains 'Gettysburg Battlefield Visitor Center' (or 'Gettysburg National Military Park Museum & Visitor Center'); Latitude/Longitude fields match 39.8133, -77.2308

task_completion.description: Agent enters the specific bold header in the description field
task_completion.visual_evidence: Description field contains HTML tags 'Battle of Gettysburg - July 1-3, 1863' or visually bolded text matching the header

task_completion.description: Agent adds bullet points and the specific hyperlink to the description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Description field contains at least 3 bullet points (or <li> tags) and the URL 'nps.gov/gett/' (or hyperlink to it)

task_completion.description: Agent saves or exports the placemark to the specified file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/' and filename 'gettysburg_marker.kml'

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI mapping application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) rather than a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping software, not a code editor or plain text editor

integrity.description: Agent did not generate the KML file using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of terminal commands like 'echo', 'cat', or scripts creating the .kml file directly

integrity.description: Agent entered data through the application's specific input fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is visible inside the application's input fields (Name, Description, Coordinates) rather than pasted as a raw file block

privileged_info_for_vlm: Official facility name: Gettysburg National Military Park Museum & Visitor Center. Official URL: nps.gov/gett.
